mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cases (user_id, dept_id, case_name, case_info, case_level, money, news_id, trigger_state, state, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deptId}, #{caseName}, #{caseInfo}, #{caseLevel}, #{money}, #{newsId}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM cases c LEFT JOIN dept d ON c.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE c.case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE cases SET state = #{state}, update_time = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
UPDATE cases SET trigger_state = #{triggerState}, update_time = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO case_text (case_id, user_id, type, content, create_time) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM case_text WHERE case_id = #{caseId} AND type = #{type}
